creator: pavlo@cs.brown.edu
text:
Still valid. Give Jason anything he wants! He's still the man!

On Monday, April 09, 2012 09:28:37 AM Jason Bacon wrote:
> Hello Andy,
> 
> Hope this email is still valid.
> 
> Can you send a reply to bug-followup@freebsd.org?
> 
> Thanks,
> 
>      -J
> 
> On 04/07/12 16:28, Chris Rees wrote:
> > Jason,
> > 
> > If you can get the maintainer to send an email saying that he's no
> > longer interested, with Subject Re: ports/166733 to
> > bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, that'd be great, then this PR can be marked
> > approved.
> >

> >
